meaning: adj.照耀的,光亮的,喜气洋洋的,愉快的
examples: She was positively beaming with pleasure.
Beaming, he replied, "Like hogs love slop."
The Pompidou-style glass courtyard features a giant screen beaming the work of emerging artists.
Beaming, the 63-year-old president of Star Scientific hands over the bag as if it contains gold.
